name: zero-trust
description: Zero-Trust Verification — the whole suite in one plugin (ADR 0025 consolidation of the former spec-gen, autopilot, codebase-health, marshal, org-memory, and triage plugins). Covers the ADLC left to right through one shared machine-readable Verification Manifest: /spec grills the human about raw intent — interview first, synthesis after — into a Spec + complete manifest (refuse-to-finalize, background two-attacker adversarial round, human-only confirmed-CORE); /autopilot drains manifest-bearing Specs into PRs autonomously (disjoint-ownership planning, RED/GREEN TDD, multi-validator review, D6.5 anti-vacuous mutation gate, N=5 determinism, host-agnostic GitHub + Bitbucket DC); /audit + /verify run the closed-loop codebase-health tier (seven specialist agents, fingerprinted findings, debt ratchet, closing tests rerun 5x, /remediate and /health-loop wiring); /marshal-pass is the serial deterministic composed-state merge backstop (post-rebase build verification, zero agent judgment in the merge path); org-memory is the read-only refuse-by-default MCP index over repo-resident memory; /triage turns an emitted production incident into a resumable incident-Spec through one vendor-neutral telemetry adapter. Deterministic tools find evidence; agents judge; nothing counts until verified. One copy of every vendored artifact — the manifest schema, validator toolchain, claim-overlap and mutation-adapter primitives, and the ADR 0002 escalation criterion live exactly once in this plugin.
